name: delta (Syntax-Highlighting Git Diff Viewer)

performance.notes: Rust-based; very fast; minimal overhead as git pager

agent_readiness.notes: Beautiful syntax-highlighted git diff viewer as git pager. Configure in ~/.gitconfig: [core] pager = delta. Side-by-side diffs. Line numbering. Word-level diff highlighting. Themes (Dracula, Nord, etc.). Hyperlinks in supported terminals. diff-so-fancy is older alternative. bat is similar for file viewing. Rust-based (fast). Works with git diff, git show, git log -p, git blame. Also works as standalone diff viewer. Highly configurable via gitconfig.

gotchas: CLI tool only — not a library
Non-standard terminals may have rendering issues
best_when: Developers wanting beautiful syntax-highlighted git diffs
Replacing plain git diff with readable, colored output
Pair with lazygit for terminal-based git workflow
avoid_when: When IDE diff viewer is preferred
summary: delta is a Rust-based git diff pager with syntax highlighting, side-by-side diffs, line numbers, and themes. Configured as git's pager: `[core] pager = delta`. Works with git diff, show, log, blame. Beautiful output with word-level diff highlighting. The modern replacement for plain git diff output. Pairs well with lazygit for a complete terminal git workflow.
